task_completion.description: Navigate to and open the existing 'Meridian Technologies Inc' account for editing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: SuiteCRM interface showing the 'Meridian Technologies Inc' account in Edit View. The original address '1800 South Congress Ave' might be visible before changes are made.

task_completion.description: Update the billing address fields to the new Raleigh location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Billing Address fields show Street: '4200 Commerce Court, Suite 310', City: 'Raleigh', State: 'NC', and Postal Code: '27601'.
The Office Phone input field contains '(919) 555-0142'.

task_completion.description: Update the Industry field to Technology.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Industry dropdown or input field is set to 'Technology'.

task_completion.description: Update the Description field with the relocation details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Description text area contains 'Relocated from Austin TX office effective January 2025. Primary contact remains David Chen.'
The Detail View of the 'Meridian Technologies Inc' account showing the newly updated fields, indicating the 'Save' action was successful.

integrity.description: The agent used the SuiteCRM web interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interacting with the SuiteCRM application, not a terminal or database client.

integrity.description: The agent edited the existing record rather than creating a new one.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should show 'Edit' for an existing account rather than 'Create Account'. There should be no evidence of duplicate 'Meridian Technologies Inc' records being created.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely interacted with the CRM fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: Input fields, dropdowns, and text areas in the CRM are correctly populated, rather than text being pasted into a notepad or unrelated application.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target account is 'Meridian Technologies Inc'. The original street address was '1800 South Congress Ave'. The updated values must be: Street: '4200 Commerce Court, Suite 310', City: 'Raleigh', State: 'NC', Zip: '27601', Phone: '(919) 555-0142', Industry: 'Technology'. The Description must include 'Relocated' and 'David Chen'.
